---
title: "Program"
pagetitle: "Program – CANCOTS 2027"
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-body">
<main class="content">
```

## Program Overview

The CANCOTS 2027 program will include plenary talks, contributed paper sessions, poster sessions,
and opportunities for informal discussion and networking. Details will be posted here as they
become available.

## Keynote Speakers

*Keynote speaker announcements coming soon.*

## Schedule

*The full conference schedule will be posted here closer to the conference date.*

## Social Events

*Information on social events and excursions will be posted here.*

```{=html}
</main>

<aside class="sidebar">
  <div class="sidebar-box news">
    <h3>News</h3>
    <p>Program details to be announced.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="sidebar-box">
    <h3>Important Dates</h3>
    <ul class="dates-list">
      <li><span class="date-label">Schedule posted:</span> TBD</li>
      <li><span class="date-label">Conference:</span> 14–16 May 2027</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</aside>
</div>
```
